title: ctenitis scabrosa
intro: Ctenitis scabrosa, also known as the scaly ctenitis fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is primarily found in China and is used in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. The health benefits of Ctenitis scabrosa include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
